summary: No meaningful architectural drift after packet 10. Schema, API contracts (including new GET /api/repos/{id} and GET /api/repos/{id}/history), CSS design system, UI components, and tracker state all match the intended architecture. All 178/178 tests pass. Only finding is carryover VCS hygiene (7 untracked test files).
notes: Activity chart correctly uses AreaChart with stackOffset=sign and Area fill=none for net line (avoids Recharts Line-inside-AreaChart gotcha). Global table CSS matches spec §5.5. Prior packet-09 audit fix (Full Scan button scope) confirmed still in place with regression test. orch_launch.sh now tracked (prior finding resolved). 7 test files (91 tests) remain untracked — operator should commit before packet 11.
